de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser

Class ParsingFacade

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser.ParsingFacade

  • public abstract class ParsingFacade
extends java.lang.Object
    This facade provides low-level access to the ANTLR4 Parser and Lexer.

    You should only use it if you need access to the parse trees instead of terms or taclet structure.

    • Constructor Summary

    • Method Detail

      • getParseRuleContext

        @Nonnull
public static <T extends org.antlr.v4.runtime.ParserRuleContext> T getParseRuleContext(@Nonnull
                                                                                                KeyAst<T> ast)
        Use this function to retrieve the ParserRuleContext inside and KeyAst object. The use of this method is discourage and should be avoided in all high level scenarios.
        Type Parameters:
        T - parse tree type
        Parameters:
        ast - a key ast object
        Returns:
        the ParserRuleContext inside the given ast object.

        public static java.util.List<KeyAst.File> parseFiles(java.net.URL url)

      • getValue

        @Nonnull
public static java.lang.String getValue(@Nonnull
                                                 KeYParser.String_valueContext ctx)
        Translate a given context of a string_value grammar rule into a the literal value. In particular it truncates, and substitutes quote escapes \".
        Parameters:
        ctx - non-null context
        Returns:
        non-null string

      • parseIdDeclaration

        public static KeYParser.Id_declarationContext parseIdDeclaration(org.antlr.v4.runtime.CharStream stream)
        Deprecated. 
        Parse the id declaration. This a seldom special case somewhere in key.ui.

        Use is discourage.

        Parameters:
        stream -
        Returns:
